sections.paragraph:
f. beginning, origin, Isa 23:7, מִימֵי קֶדֶם קַדְמָתָהּ “whose origin (is to be sought) of ancient days” (speaking of Tyre); a former, pristine state, Eze 16:55. Constr. state becomes a prepos., and, by omission of אֲשֶׁר, a conj. before that, Psa 129:6.

קדמה

Ch. former time; hence מִן־קַדְמַת דְּנָה Dan 6:11 מִקַּדְמַת־דְּנָא Ezr 5:11, formerly.
